intent: Release v1.8.0 with Constitution-bound multi-target asset evolution, declarative audit RulePacks, reproducible audit feedback, fixture and shadow Gates, monotonic policy targets, refreshed documentation, and no automatic adoption.

required_proofs.command: uv run --no-editable --reinstall-package agent-engineering-toolkit python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
uv run python -m unittest tests.test_audit_rule_evolution tests.test_policy_targets -v
